evidence_notes: Explicit checksum/page/schema binding, one 5 V source-confirmed claim, current conflict, blocked power derivation, missing AUX voltage, patch overlay, complete gap actions, and delta-only harness posture satisfy HG1-HG6.
All required decisions and boundaries are correct; binding verification and downstream delta detail are less explicit than Sol but usable above threshold.

It correctly confirms 5 V, preserves the current conflict, refuses the blocked power derivation, and leaves AUX voltage missing.
Its patch overlay, gap records, delta-only harness readiness, provenance, and non-claims satisfy all hard gates.
The repeat preserves every required evidence decision and all allowed field states.
Every unresolved quantity has machine-readable gap, owner follow-up, blocking impact, and rerun trigger; the overlay is patch-only.
The pass is consistent with the original Sol low result and makes no final harness or global-readiness claim.
